consists.e: The sandwich consists of bread, meat, and cheese.

contemporary.d: happening or existing at the same time
contemporary.e: The contemporary art exhibit features paintings from the past 20 years.

ceremony.d: A formal event with special traditions
ceremony.e: The graduation ceremony was a special day for the students.

chamber.d: A room or space inside a larger building
chamber.e: The concert was held in the music chamber.

charity.d: Helping others by giving money, time, or other support
charity.e: The family donated to a charity that helps homeless people.

christians.d: People who believe in and follow the religion of Christianity
christians.e: The Christians in the community met for a special prayer service.

clothing.d: Things people wear to cover and protect their bodies
clothing.e: The child chose a favorite shirt from their clothing.

cloud.d: A fluffy white or gray object in the sky
cloud.e: The child watched the clouds float by overhead.

complicated.d: Something that is very difficult or confusing
complicated.e: The math problem was too complicated for the student to solve.

contrast.d: When two things are very different from each other
contrast.e: The white cat was in contrast to the black dog.

covers.d: Something that goes over or on top of something else
covers.e: The child pulled the blanket to cover themselves.
